alignment_scope.summary: This manifest indexes GovAI repository artefacts that support technical readiness narratives aligned with ISO/IEC 42001 themes. It does not assert certification, legal compliance, or suitability for any jurisdiction or sector.

boundaries.summary: ISO/IEC 42001 readiness tooling validates manifests and clause indices, references existing governance documentation, and does not change GovAI verdict semantics, billing, ledger storage, or database schemas.

non_goals: GovAI does not provide ISO/IEC 42001 certification, accredited audit outcomes, or legal opinions.
Clause mappings are indicative readiness support; gap analysis and management system operation remain with the organization.
Validators confirm repository artefact presence and structure only; they do not assess control effectiveness in production.

operational_probes.description: Schema and path validation for this manifest.
operational_probes.name: validate_iso_42001_alignment_manifest

operational_probes.description: Schema and evidence path validation for the clause index.
operational_probes.name: validate_iso_42001_clause_index

readiness_themes.summary: Operator-facing overview of ISO/IEC 42001 readiness support, terminology, and explicit non-claims.
Portable governance evidence packs supply structured artefacts suitable for management system documented information.
Deterministic standards corpus evaluation supports repeatable internal measurement of interchange conformance.
Trust center entry point clarifies security and governance interfaces without certification claims.

summary: GovAI ISO/IEC 42001 alignment manifest indexes clause mappings, readiness themes, portable standards examples, and stdlib validation probes. It frames readiness as evidence-backed repository scaffolding, not certification.
